ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: !Return_to_Rubrik_warehouse__c && ( ( ISBLANK( Delivery_Account__c ) && ISBLANK( Delivery_User__c ) ) || ( !ISBLANK( Delivery_Account__c ) && !ISBLANK( Delivery_User__c ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please fill either the delivery account or the delivery user
